highlights: The AI landscape is seeing a surge in specialized agentic systems, with new multi-agent workbenches for scientific research and autonomous agents for hardware development and robotics demonstrating advanced problem-solving capabilities.

Major advancements in foundation models continue, highlighted by OpenAI's preview of GPT-5.6 Sol and Meituan's release of a massive 1.6T-parameter open MoE model featuring a native 1-million-token context, pushing the boundaries of model scale and performance.

Critical infrastructure and developer tools are evolving rapidly, from the introduction of LLM-optimized inference chips by OpenAI and Broadcom to comprehensive open-source AI workbenches and advanced cybersecurity tools by OpenAI's Daybreak initiative.

agents.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science Beta: Multi-Agent AI Workbench for Reproducible Science
agents.summary: Anthropic's Claude Science Beta provides a multi-agent AI workbench for reproducible scientific pipelines in genomics, proteomics, and cheminformatics, coordinating domain specialists and ensuring citation accuracy with full code history.

agents.title: NVIDIA HORIZON: Hands-Free Agent for Git Worktrees Hits 100% RTL Benchmark Completion
agents.summary: NVIDIA's HORIZON is a hands-free agent framework that autonomously evolves Git worktrees, achieving 100% completion on RTL benchmarks, signifying a major advance in automated hardware design and verification for developers.

agents.title: NVIDIA AI Introduces ASPIRE: Self-Improving Robotics Framework for Long Tasks
agents.summary: NVIDIA AI's ASPIRE is a self-improving robotics framework that writes and refines robot control programs, distills validated repairs into a skill library, and demonstrates significant zero-shot transfer capabilities on complex, long-horizon tasks, enabling faster robotics development.

models.title: OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol: Next-Generation Model with Enhanced Capabilities
models.summary: OpenAI has previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model boasting enhanced capabilities in coding, scientific research, and cybersecurity, coupled with their most advanced safety framework, offering builders a powerful new foundation.

models.title: Meituan Releases LongCat-2.0: 1.6T-Parameter Open MoE Model with 1M Context
models.summary: Meituan introduces LongCat-2.0, an open 1.6 trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model featuring a native 1-million-token context built on LongCat Sparse Attention, designed for high-performance training and serving on domestic AI ASIC superpods.

models.title: OpenAI Introduces GeneBench-Pro: New Benchmark for Scientific AI Performance
models.summary: OpenAI has introduced GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark designed to test AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets, facilitating more robust evaluation of scientific AI models.

tools.title: Synthetic Sciences Releases OpenScience: Open-Source, Model-Agnostic AI Workbench
tools.summary: Synthetic Sciences has launched OpenScience, an Apache-2.0 licensed, model-agnostic AI workbench for scientific research across ML, biology, physics, and chemistry, offering 250+ editable skills and scientific databases on self-hosted infrastructure.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Jalapeño: LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
tools.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have collaborated to introduce Jalapeño, a new custom AI chip specifically engineered for LLM inference, aiming to significantly enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability for AI systems.

tools.title: OpenAI Introduces Daybreak Tools for Global Organizational Security
tools.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, designed to help organizations at scale find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities, bolstering cybersecurity defenses with advanced AI capabilities.

companies.title: HP Inc. Launches Strategic Partnership with OpenAI for AI Integration
companies.summary: HP Inc. is expanding its strategic 'Frontier' partnership with OpenAI to integrate AI across its customer experiences, software development, and broader enterprise operations, signaling a significant push towards AI-driven transformation.

companies.title: ChatGPT Adoption Continues Global Expansion
companies.summary: New data from OpenAI reveals significant global expansion in ChatGPT adoption, with users increasing engagement, exploring diverse capabilities, and driving growth across various regions and languages, indicating broad market penetration.

companies.title: Google Invests $1.5 Billion in Alabama Data Center Expansion
companies.summary: Google announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama, reinforcing its infrastructure presence and commitment to regional development critical for AI operations.

learning.title: Guide to Training Gemma-3 for Structured Mathematical Reasoning
learning.summary: A detailed workflow demonstrates how to train Gemma-3 for structured mathematical reasoning using Tunix GRPO, LoRA adapters for lightweight training, and GSM8K rewards, enabling builders to improve model performance on complex math problems.

learning.title: Structured PDF-to-JSON: A Guide to Open-Source Extraction Models in 2026
learning.summary: A comprehensive guide outlines current open-source models and methods for converting unstructured PDF data into structured JSON format on private hardware, addressing a critical need for enterprise data processing workflows.

learning.title: Ask an AI Expert: Explaining the Full-Stack AI Approach
learning.summary: A Google AI expert provides an explanation of the 'full-stack AI' approach, clarifying its components and significance as a foundational strategy in AI development, offering valuable conceptual understanding for builders.
